name: Ravioli
recipeIngredient: Grated Fontina cheese (just a wee bit)
Fresh dill (dried can be used as well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and cook the raviolis.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan, remove from heat, and add flour, salt, and white pepper, stirring constantly.
3. Slowly add milk while stirring continuously until smooth.
4. Return the mixture to the stove and bring to a boil, stirring often.
5. Simmer for 1 minute once boiling, then stir in chopped dill (use your judgment on quantity).
6. Serve over warm raviolis, garnished with a sprig of fresh dill if available.
